overview.description: All-in-one AI agent platform for digital humans, conversational AI, and customer experience automation
overview.description_long: Born Digital is a Czech AI company founded in 2019 by contact center experts and AI enthusiasts. It provides an all-in-one platform for building and deploying AI agents and digital humans that automate customer service, sales, and marketing activities via chat, voice, and avatar-based interactions. Its three core products are: AI Agent (conversational), Customer Insight Analytics, and Digital Human. Trusted by 150+ companies across 15 countries.
overview.tagline: Born in code, built for business — our digital humans think, decide, and deliver across the globe

history.origin_story: In 2019, customer contact center experts teamed up with artificial intelligence enthusiasts and Born Digital was born, with a mission to provide companies with advanced digital transformation of contact centers.

key_milestones.event: Founded in Prague by contact center and AI experts
Recognized by Gartner in the 2025 Market Guide for Digital Humans
EU-funded project on LLMs for knowledge base processing (NextGenerationEU)

awards: Gartner 2025 Market Guide for Digital Humans

metadata.notes: Founded 2019. 70 employees globally per About page. Clients include luxury patisseries, Dubai security forces, and the world's largest ATM manufacturer. Two EU-funded R&D projects (NextGenerationEU). Address: Eberlova 1483/3, 155 00 Praha.
